ValidationRule.description: Placement is in a “Pending Confirmation” status and Client Offer Letter is "Centra client", and at the same time, no Hiring Manager has been assigned. Displays validation message
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: TEXT(Placement_Status__c) = 'Pending Confirmation' && TEXT( Account__r.Client_Offer_Letter__c ) = 'Centra Client Conf' && Hiring_Manager__c = NULL
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Hiring Manager Required for Offer Letter Distribution. Please update on Job and Placement
